summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Income & Expense Tracker. All requested features are working correctly: dropdown functionality on Income/Expenses pages, Settings page tabs on mobile, and CRUD operations.
passed_tests: Income page Product dropdown - clicking populates text input correctly (tested with 'AI Service')
Income page Customer/Person dropdown - clicking populates text input correctly (tested with 'Abdulaziz Baginda')
Expenses page Category dropdown - clicking populates text input correctly (tested with 'Food')
Settings page tabs on mobile - all 4 tabs (Products, Categories, Import, Backup) visible and accessible
Settings Products CRUD - Add/Edit/Delete products working with toast notifications
Income page CRUD - Add/Edit/Delete income entries working with toast notifications
Expenses page CRUD - Add/Edit/Delete expense entries working with toast notifications
Mobile responsiveness - Dashboard, Income, Expenses, Monthly Summary, Reports pages all display correctly
Mobile navigation - Hamburger menu works correctly to navigate between pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All dropdown functionality has been fixed by replacing HTML datalist elements with Shadcn Select components. The Select components properly populate the text input fields below them when an option is selected. Settings page tabs use horizontal scrolling on mobile with overflow-x-auto. All CRUD operations work correctly with proper toast notifications.

dropdown_functionality.income_product_select: PASS - Selecting from dropdown populates text input
dropdown_functionality.income_person_select: PASS - Selecting from dropdown populates text input
dropdown_functionality.expense_category_select: PASS - Selecting from dropdown populates text input
